Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x4
Size:
0x4
Source:
adc_acquisition_reg_definition.rdl

Description

status & config register for adc controller

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:10] - - - -
[9] F1_FULL rw, woclr 0x0 Block Fx Full
[8] F0_FULL rw, woclr 0x0 Block Fx Full
[7:0] MODE rw 0x0 Acquisition System Mode

Field Descriptions

F1_FULL - Block Fx Full

High if the Fx Block was fully written

F0_FULL - Block Fx Full

High if the Fx Block was fully written

MODE - Acquisition System Mode

configure acquisition system mode (idle, running in mode x, ...)

enum adc_mode
IDLE 0x0
SINGLE_ACQ_F0 0x4
CONTINUOUS_ACQ_F0_F1 0x10
